name: Aberdare Catchment Forest Restoration
blocking_factor: Smallholder encroachment on forest boundary and charcoal trade
column13: 000 ha achieved. Deforestation rate on private land adjacent to forest exceeds reforestation pace. Net hydrological benefit modest.

name: Nyeri County Stormwater Master Plan
blocking_factor: Not adopted — county technical capacity insufficient
notes: GIZ-supported plan completed 2021. Not integrated into county CIDP 2023-2027. New county government reviewing.

name: Chania River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: High-density settlement on riparian land predates NEMA
notes: Riparian buffer mapped. Enforcement requires demolition of 1
column12: 800+ structures built before 2005. Political will absent in any election cycle.

name: Nyeri Town Drainage Upgrade
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and colonial-era pipe replacement costs
notes: Main trunk drains replaced 2022. Secondary network (colonial-era earthen drains) not addressed. Pipe replacement costs significantly exceed original estimates.

name: Tana Headwaters Early Warning
notes: 5 gauges on Chania and Gura operational. 4-hour warning achievable. Karatina and Mukurwe-ini communities not in alert chain.
